news.t: Structural Shift or Recency Bias? Decoding Value's Mixed Signals in 2026
This ETF strategy may help investors skirt market concentration risk

holdings.infoBox: AVLV is an equity ETF with a total of 274 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.30%, Apple at 2.98%, Amazon.com at 2.82%, Exxon Mobil at 2.58%, and Meta Platforms at 2.47%.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S. Large Cap Value ETF (AVLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US large-cap value companies selected based on fundamental criteria. AVLV was launched on Sep 21, 2021 and is issued by American Century Investments.
